name: Corned Beef and Cabbage/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place corned beef in the slow cooker pot.
2. Cover with water and add onion, garlic, and bay leaves.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
4. If desired, remove cooked corned beef from the pot.
5. Turn the control to High and add cabbage wedges to the corned beef broth.
6. Cover and cook until cabbage is done (20-30 minutes).
NOTE: From past experience, the cabbage may require more time than indicated. Boiling the cabbage on the stove is a quicker method.
